label: Stone Market

materialPalette.wall: pale stone block walls with clean corners
materialPalette.roof: dark slate roof with tidy ridge lines
materialPalette.trim: polished wood shutters and sign boards
materialPalette.accent: desks, counters, crates, barrels, and framed wall art

notes: Use for denser streets and civic buildings.
Prefer flatter fronts and repeated facade rhythm, but vary interior service roles.
